# The Document Index

> The living index of document-AI tooling — OCR, PDF extraction, document parsing, layout
> & structure, table extraction and vision-language understanding — ranked daily by GitHub momentum.

Updated: 2026-07-06T14:17:10.100658+00:00
Tools indexed: 201

## Top document-AI tools by momentum

- [baidu/Unlimited-OCR](https://github.com/baidu/Unlimited-OCR) — momentum 89, ⭐13459 — OCR Engines — Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.

- [docling-project/docling](https://github.com/docling-project/docling) — momentum 86, ⭐62742 — Document Parsing — Get your documents ready for gen AI
